Instructions, header files, JavaScript controls, native handlers, console functions, scripts, licenses, and makefiles for JerryScript on ESP8266.

## Folders
- **[docs](docs/README.md)**: Instructions for patching the ESP8266 SDK for JerryScript and setting up the ESP8266 toolchain.
- **[include](include/README.md)**: Header files for GPIO, UART, JavaScript execution, and configuration on ESP8266 microcontroller.
- **[js](js/README.md)**: Controls GPIO pins for LED blinking and defines a system loop function with a confirmation message.
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Defines and registers native JavaScript handlers for GPIO and utility functions, and functions for JavaScript code execution using JerryScript on ESP8266.
- **[user](user/README.md)**: Console and log functions, build configuration, GPIO control, and JavaScript task initialization for ESP8266.

## Files
- **[gen_misc.sh](gen_misc.sh.md)**: A Bash script for configuring and generating firmware binaries for the ESP8266 with user input.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: Licenses for Samsung Electronics and ESPRESSIF SYSTEMS software, including Apache 2.0 and MIT terms.
- **[Makefile](Makefile.md)**: Makefile for building the JerryScript target on ESP8266 with configurations for release and debug modes.
- **[Makefile.esp8266](Makefile.md.esp8266)**: Makefile for building and flashing JerryScript on ESP8266 with specific compile and environment settings.
- **[readme.md](readme.md.md)**: Instructions for building, flashing, and optimizing JerryScript on the ESP8266 platform.
